channel.title: BUbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Nancy Guthrie search ongoing after more than two weeks
item.description: The search for 84-year-old Nancy Guthrie, the mother of "Today" show host Savannah Guthrie, is entering day 16 as investigators await the results of D...

item.title: WATCH: London police battle epidemic of phone snatching
item.description: ABC News joined undercover police as they target thieves on high-powered bikes snatching phones.

item.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
item.description: Jackson was a major contributor to the Civil Rights Movement and helped it accomplish many of its goals.

item.title: Jesse Jackson's civil rights legacy
item.description: Civil rights activist Rev. Jesse Jackson, who marched with Martin Luther King Jr., died at 84, his family said. Antjuan Seawright, a Democratic strate...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine set to hold talks in Geneva as another attack rocks thousands of Ukrainians
item.description: Russian and Ukrainian officials are set to hold talks in Geneva on Tuesday. This comes as thousands of Ukrainians were impacted by a Russian attack ov...

item.title: Ukrainians react to massive attack as Russia and Ukraine hold talks in Geneva
item.description: Ukraine sent negotiators to Geneva, Switzerland, to hold talks with their Russian counterparts as the war rages on. CBS News' Holly Williams and Elean...

item.title: Witkoff, Kushner set for Geneva talks on Ukraine, Iran as Trump pushes for deals
item.description: Special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner -- U.S. President Donald Trump's son-in-law -- will lead American negotiators in Geneva, Switzerland.

item.title: Historian chronicles how debates that define U.S. history can help us navigate today's politics
item.description: Jon Meacham, a historian and bestselling author, discusses the state of American politics, what we can learn from U.S. history, and his latest book, "...

item.title: Warner Bros. Discovery restarts takeover talks with Paramount Skydance
item.description: Warner Bros. Discovery said that Paramount Skydance is considering enhancing its buyout offer for the entertainment company.

item.title: Rev. Jesse Jackson, civil rights icon, dies at 84
item.description: Civil rights icon Rev. Jesse Jackson died on Tuesday morning aged 84, according to a statement released by his family.

item.title: WATCH: Reverend Jesse Jackson has died at age 84
item.description: Civil rights activist Reverend Jesse Jackson passed away, he was surrounded by his family.

item.title: Nancy Guthrie kidnapping investigators work with Walmart after identifying suspectâs backpack
